leadText: The Magmarizer (Japanese: マグマブースター Magmabooster) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Magmar to evolve into Magmortar when traded while holding it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Magmar to evolve into Magmortar when traded while holding it. This consumes the Magmarizer. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , due to the absence of held items, the Magmarizer simply needs to be used on Magmar to trigger the Evolution, which consumes the item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Magmarizer at Luminous Spring , Magmar can be evolved into Magmortar . This consumes the Link Cable and Magmarizer. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S A box brimming with a huge amount of magma energy. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.
